clusters.justification: These terms reliably co-activate within cortico-limbic circuitry, representing the broad macroscopic domain of generating, experiencing, and regulating valenced physiological and emotional states.
These concepts map onto mesolimbic and striato-cortical pathways, anchoring the overarching functional domain of incentive processing, cost-benefit calculation, and goal-directed behavioral output.

Anchored primarily by default mode network activity, these terms converge on internally directed, constructive mental representations required for modeling the self, others, and enduring interpersonal narratives.
